Findings:
Brake pads + rotor replaced 03/19. Re-inspection confirms:
- new pads bedded in correctly
- rotor surface uniform
- no pull on hard stop from 40 mph
Vehicle returned to service.
Cooling system pressure-tested at 18 PSI for 30 min, held. Water pump replaced 03/22 under WO-2026-0015. No coolant odor at idle or under load.
Hydraulic coupler replaced 02/05. PTO cycled 25x with no weep at coupler or downstream lines.
Defrost vent diagnosed: blower-motor squirrel cage was unbalanced on driver side. Replaced under warranty 02/20. Defrost now even left-to-right.
Cargo door hinges tightened, bushings replaced 04/02. Door now sits flush; no drop when open.
DEF system flushed 03/19. New cap installed. No crystalline buildup at 4-day re-inspection.
